13.reason: [The condition should be `visited[i] == 0` to visit unvisited nodes, not `!= 0`. This causes DFS to skip all unvisited neighbors and terminate early.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [The condition should be `visited[i] == 0` to visit unvisited nodes, not `!= 0`. This causes DFS to skip all unvisited neighbors and terminate early.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [The condition `visited[i] != 0` prevents visiting unvisited nodes; it should be `visited[i] == 0` to visit only unvisited adjacent vertices.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [The condition `visited[i] != 0` is incorrect; it should be `visited[i] == 0` to visit unvisited neighbors.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [The condition should be `visited[i] == 0` to visit unvisited nodes, not `!= 0`. This causes DFS to skip unvisited neighbors and may lead to infinite recursion or incorrect traversal.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [The condition `visited[i] != 0` is incorrect; it should be `visited[i] == 0` to visit unvisited nodes.]

29.reason: [Same error as in DFS: should be `visited[i] == 0` to enqueue unvisited neighbors. Using `!= 0` prevents adding any new nodes to the queue, breaking BFS.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Same error as in DFS: should be `visited[i] == 0` to enqueue unvisited neighbors. Using `!= 0` prevents adding any new nodes to the queue, breaking BFS.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Same error as in DFS: `visited[i] != 0` should be `visited[i] == 0` to enqueue only unvisited neighbors.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [The condition `visited[i] != 0` is incorrect; it should be `visited[i] == 0` to enqueue unvisited neighbors.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [The condition should be `visited[i] == 0` to enqueue unvisited neighbors. Using `!= 0` prevents enqueuing unvisited nodes, leading to incomplete BFS traversal.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [The condition `visited[i] != 0` is incorrect; it should be `visited[i] == 0` to enqueue unvisited adjacent nodes.]
